# MarginLog

> Profit tracker for resellers. Log sales in 30 seconds, see true net profit after fees, export to CSV for taxes.

MarginLog is a web app for people who sell secondhand goods on platforms like eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, Etsy, Facebook Marketplace, and Vinted. It solves a specific problem: resellers often don't know their real profit because platform fees, shipping costs, and purchase price eat into revenue in ways that are hard to track manually.

## What it does

- Log a sale in ~30 seconds: enter sale price, platform, shipping, and what you paid for the item
- Automatically calculates true net profit after all fees
- Dashboard shows profit trends, best-performing platforms, and ROI
- CSV export for tax season
- Free during beta (no credit card required)

## Who it's for

Resellers who sell on: eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, Etsy, Facebook Marketplace, Vinted. Particularly useful for people selling across multiple platforms who lose track of which platform is actually most profitable.

## Free tools (no signup required)

- eBay profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/ebay
- Poshmark profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/poshmark
- Mercari profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/mercari
- Depop profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/depop
- Etsy profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/etsy
- Facebook Marketplace profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/facebook-marketplace
- Vinted profit calculator: https://marginlog.net/calculators/vinted
- Compare all platforms: https://marginlog.net/calculators/compare

## Pricing

Free during beta. Planned: free up to 20 items/month, then $9.99/month.

## Links

- Homepage: https://marginlog.net
- Sign up free: https://marginlog.net/signup
- All calculators: https://marginlog.net/calculators
